TMS.name: TMS
TMS.description:
Normal Scan: TMS > CAPPI > 3km_R, 64km (Radar_TMS_EEC/CAPPI_Ref_64km)
Rapid Scan: TMS RS > RS PPI > dBZ(H), 64km (TMS_RAPID_SCAN/TMS_RS_PPI_Z_000_064)

TMS (raw).name: TMS (raw)
TMS (raw).description:
Raw TMS data from /backup_data/TMS_IrisFormatRaw_archive (via radarop@rad19-t1), checks for raw data with the exact minutes 00, 06, 12, 18, 24, 30, 36, 42, 48, 54 at 6-minute intervals, with missing raw data filled by rapid scan data when available.
Data processing runs daily at 9:30am for the previous day, so current day data may not be available until the next morning.

TMS (raw) (no maint).name: TMS (raw) (no maint)
TMS (raw) (no maint).description:
Raw TMS data from /backup_data/TMS_IrisFormatRaw_archive (via radarop@rad19-t1), checks for raw data with the exact minutes 00, 06, 12, 18, 24, 30, 36, 42, 48, 54 at 6-minute intervals, with missing raw data filled by rapid scan data when available.
Data processing runs daily at 9:30am for the previous day, so current day data may not be available until the next morning.

TCR.name: TCR
TCR.description:
Normal Scan: TCR > CAPPI > 3km_R, 256km (Radar_TCR/CAPPI_Ref_256km)
Rapid Scan: TCR RS > RS PPI > dBZ(H), 64km (Radar_TCR_rapid_scan/TCR_RS_Z_064km)

CCH HKWS1 (raw).description: Raw CCH data from /mnt/raid_sata/hongkong-cheungchau/level2/odim (via meteo@HKWS1 which is 192.168.185.84), checks for raw data at 6-minute intervals.

SHW X-Band.name: SHW X-Band
SHW X-Band.description: SHW > Real time > Velocity (Zoom in) > 2.0 deg (XBAND/HKX_020_020.ppi_Velocity)

Internet.name: Internet
Internet.description: Internet > 天氣雷達圖像 > COM 3km_R, 256km (Internet/256km_old) (every 6 minutes)
